name: Harvey Korman
blurb: Carol Burnett's indispensable second man, famous for breaking on camera.
bio: Harvey Korman (1927-2008) was an American comedic actor who became a cornerstone of The Carol Burnett Show for a decade, winning four Emmy Awards and famously unable to keep a straight face opposite Tim Conway. He also starred in Mel Brooks films including Blazing Saddles.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
